---
lightbox: true
---

::: {.column-screen-inset}

::: {layout-ncol=3}

![The drone mid flight!](./media/flight.png){group="my-gallery"}

![Jakobshavn Glacier modelled in PISM.](./media/pism.png){group="my-gallery"}

![The drone parked.](./media/drone.jpg){group="my-gallery"}

![Alterach Glacier modelled in IGM.](./media/alt.png){group="my-gallery"}

![Ben in front of Austdalsbeern with a drone.](media/benjamin.jpg){group="my-gallery"}

![Alterach Glacier modelled in IGM again.](./media/alt.png){group="my-gallery"}

![Here he is again.](./media/benjamin.jpg){group="my-gallery"}

:::

:::
